title: Science history: Carbon-14 is discovered, opening a window into past civilizations — Feb. 27, 1940
summary: Martin Kamen and Samuel Ruben's discovery of the radioactive isotope carbon-14 in 1940 helped usher in a new era of dating artifacts from past civilizations.

body: تمكن عون سلطة برتبة “شيخ أبحاث” تابع لعمالة مكناس، أخيرا، من ضبط لص ثلاثيني متلبسا بسرقة كمية مهمة من قضبان حديدية لسياج وقائي، بالمحور الطرقي الرابط بين باب القصبة أكدال وباب بوعماير، غير بعيد عن الفضاء المحيط بالقصر الملكي التابع للنفوذ الترابي لجماعة المشور بمكناس. وأشعر العون أكمل القراءة » المقالة سقوط سارق سياج بلدية بمكناس fمنشورة على جريدة الصباح .

title: 10 ملايين دولار.. مكافأة أميركية لاعتقال شقيقين يقودان عصابة
summary: قالت وزارة الخارجية الأميركية يوم الخميس إنها ستدفع ما يصل إلى 10 ملايين دولار مقابل معلومات تؤدي إلى اعتقال أو إدانة شقيقين تم تحديدهما كزعيمين لعصابة سينالوا المكسيكية في ولاية باها كاليفورنيا، التي تضم مدينة تيخوانا.

title: 'Revolutionary': Vera C. Rubin Observatory found 800,000 objects of interest in a single night
summary: The Vera C. Rubin Observatory sent scientists nearly 1 million astronomy alerts in one night, showing off changes in the sky. Eventually, the telescope is expected to reach 7 million alerts per night.

title: Fresh look at Apollo moon rocks solves decades-old mystery about the moon's magnetic field
summary: The lunar rocks collected by Apollo astronauts suggested the moon had a strong magnetic field. A new analysis shows the opposite.

title: Babies weren't supposed to be mourned in the Roman Empire. These rare liquid-gypsum burials prove otherwise.
summary: Despite historical records saying otherwise, Roman babies were mourned at death, research into unique plaster burials from York reveals.

title: Kazakhstan plants tens of thousands of trees in giant effort to reintroduce tigers
summary: Kazakhstan planted 37,000 seedlings and cuttings in South Balkhash last year to prepare for the return of its tigers, which disappeared more than 70 years ago.

title: We now know why shoes squeak, and it involves miniature lightning bolts
summary: Harvard engineers think they've found the reason basketball shoes squeak, and it's due to pockets of friction between the rubber and the court.

summary: Ancient artifacts unearthed in Alaska revealed migrants from Asia might have come to the Americas via an inland route, and not a coastal path.

title: The Last Mystery of Antarctica’s ‘Blood Falls’ Has Finally Been Solved
summary: New research sheds light on what drives reddish water to emerge from underground to pour onto the Taylor Glacier.

title: Far fewer people are related to Genghis Khan than previously assumed, new genomic study suggests
summary: Some experts have suggested as many as 1 in 200 men in the world are related to Genghis Khan. But a new genomic study reveals the number is significantly lower.

summary: The final "blood moon" total lunar eclipse until 2029 is coming to North America this Tuesday (March 3). Here's how to watch it online.

summary: Lotus shoes are tiny footwear associated with foot-binding, a beauty practice that lasted for at least a millennium in China.

summary: An ancient, fast-feeding quasar is breaking the rules of how black holes consume matter and generate galaxy-shaping jets.

title: 2,000-year-old skulls reveal people in ancient Vietnam permanently blackened their teeth — a stylish practice that persists today
summary: In a study of 2,000-year-old skulls from Vietnam, archaeologists discovered that iron was the primary component that dyed teeth black.

title: Ancient 'Asgard' microbe may have used oxygen long before it was plentiful on Earth, offering new clue to origins of complex life
summary: A new study suggests that ancient microbes once cast as oxygen haters may have actually learned to use the gas, offering a clue to how the first complex cells — and, eventually, all plants and animals — evolved.

title: Artemis II update: NASA targets March 6 for launch of historic moon mission following successful 'wet dress rehearsal'
summary: NASA is targeting March 6 as the earliest possible launch date for the Artemis II mission to the moon following a successful 'wet dress rehearsal' on Thursday.

title: Bungled Boeing Starliner mission was the highest order of mishap that put stranded astronauts at risk, report says
summary: The 2024 Starliner mission, which left astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams stranded in space for nine months, has received NASA's worst mishap classification in a damning report.

title: تأثير إبستين يصل إلى "مؤتمر الديناصورات".. ماذا حدث؟
summary: قرر مؤتمر بريطاني متخصص في بحث تاريخ الديناصورات، منع حضور بعض علماء الحفريات المذكورين في ملفات جيفري إبستين، رجل الأعمال الأميركي المدان بانتهاكات جنسية.

title: مقتل أشخاص في انهيار مبنى بشمال لبنان.. وبحث متواصل عن ناجين
summary: قُتل خمسة أشخاص على الأقل، الأحد، في مدينة طرابلس في شمال لبنان إثر انهيار مبنى، وفق ما أفاد الإعلام الرسمي، بينما تواصل فرق الإنقاذ البحث عن ناجين.
